programme.desc: S1 , E297 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E433 : After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1457 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Kamalar Banabas
programme.desc: Banished from the kingdom under false pretences, Kamala endures hardship while raising her son, determined to clear her name and reunite with her loved ones.

programme.title: Sukh Dukher Sansar
programme.desc: Amar, the eldest of four, struggles to provide a better life to his younger siblings. However, things take a turn for the worse when his younger sister meets with an accident and is visually impaired.

programme.title: Satya Mithya
programme.desc: Worried to see his daughter Rita in low spirits, Mr Chowdhury decides to take her to Dhaka. There, he hires Raju, a responsible young man, whom Rita falls in love with.

programme.title: Mayer Adhikar
programme.desc: Tarulatha Chowdhury runs her business with her manager, Milesh. Joy is the only son of Mrs. Chowdhury. Through some conspiracy, Joy meets with an accident. Asha helps Joy recover and they both fall in love.

programme.title: Antaranga
programme.desc: Parna, the daughter of a rich tea-estate owner, falls for the son of her father's employee, Rana. Their relationship irks Vijay, another employee who wishes to take over the business by marrying her.

programme.title: Apon Amar Apon
programme.desc: Despite the many obstacles he faces, an aspiring singer leaves no stone unturned to establish a foothold in the music industry.
